# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: users
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: users
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: users
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: users
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: users
          image: ghcr.io/example/users:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: payments
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: payments
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: payments
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: payments
          image: ghcr.io/example/payments:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: inventory
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: inventory
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: inventory
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: inventory
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: inventory
          image: ghcr.io/example/inventory:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: admin
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: admin
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: admin
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: admin
        app.kubernetes.io/part-of: microservices
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: admin
          image: ghcr.io/example/admin:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8080
          env:
            - name: PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: http
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
